engine: python-style arrangement + multi-order lookahead pure C++ heuristic
notes: No Qt, no Boost, no third-party JSON library. Uses exact polygon overlap/gap checks, requested-priority ordering (widest rectangle family, then trapezoids, then remaining shapes, circles last), sharp trapezoid pairing with fallback search pairing, circle batch placement, dense-group side-strip retry, reserved right-circle-strip retry, and multi-order lookahead fallbacks. Arc segments are still approximated from contour vertices for placement, while circles are sampled.
